title: Square Copper Grates
description: Replaces vanilla copper grates with ones that are easier to see through, without removing the vanilla look.
body: ![All 4 levels of weathering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a15ee87d16ce33b1129e826f932b1b899b303c.png)Changes the vanilla copper grate textures to be more square/rectangular. This allows it to look more transparent without making it look too out of place :]
